en_title: Google Pixel 11 Specs Leak Ahead of Next Month’s Unveiling
cn_title: Pixel 11规格提前泄露，谷歌8月发布
subtitle: 参数仍有疑点
opus_summary: 谷歌将于8月12日发布Pixel 11系列，多份提前曝光的商品页面已泄露屏幕、电池、存储和价格等信息。不过部分参数互相矛盾，仍须等待官方确认。

paragraphs.en: Google is set to reveal its Pixel 11 lineup on August 12th, and thanks to recent leaks, the company may have little new to tell about its coming smartphones .
paragraphs.cn: 谷歌定于8月12日公布Pixel 11系列。由于近期接连出现泄露，公司届时或许已经没有多少关于新机的新消息可讲。

paragraphs.en: For instance, a 9to5Google report this week covered "three [Amazon] listings that appear to be placeholders" published early, "with official images in tow." The listings, the outlet wrote, revealed the Pixel 11 in many colors with descriptions labeling them "Midnight," "Fuchsia," and "Moss." Also, the Pixel 11 Pro was listed in "Dune," "Light Fog," and "Pine." The Pixel 11 Pro Fold was there, too, in Midnight and Pine. According to that leak, the Pixel 11 will have a 6.3-inch display, 256GB SSD, 12GB of RAM, a 4,985mAh battery, and will start at $899, or a hundred bucks higher than the Google Pixel 10 launched at.
paragraphs.cn: 例如，9to5Google本周报道了三条疑似占位内容的Amazon商品页面，这些页面提前发布，并附有官方图片。报道称，页面显示Pixel 11提供「午夜」「紫红」和「苔藓」配色；Pixel 11 Pro则有「沙丘」「浅雾」和「松木」配色；Pixel 11 Pro Fold也提供午夜和松木两种颜色。泄露信息称，Pixel 11配备6.3英寸屏幕、256GB SSD、12GB内存和4,985mAh电池，起售价899美元(约合人民币6086元)，比Pixel 10首发价高100美元(约合人民币677元)。

paragraphs.en: The next day, Android Authority reported that it had seen yet more screenshots of the listings, and that these confirmed the phone would have a 120Hz refresh rate, a 13MP front camera, and would sport Bluetooth 6 and Wi-Fi 6E capability. Interestingly, the outlet wrote that the base Pixel 11 will have a "2,856 x 1,280 resolution," conflicting with the 1,080 x 2,424 that 9to5Google reported. (I don't see that in the screenshots Android Authority published, and, as usual, it's best to take these leaked specs with a grain of salt.)
paragraphs.cn: 次日，Android Authority称看到了更多商品页面截图，并据此确认新机将拥有120Hz刷新率、1300万像素前置摄像头，并支持蓝牙6和Wi-Fi 6E。有趣的是，该媒体称基础款Pixel 11分辨率为2,856×1,280，与9to5Google报道的1,080×2,424相冲突。（笔者没有在Android Authority公布的截图中看到这一参数；与往常一样，对泄露规格最好持保留态度。）

paragraphs.en: Moving on, Android Authority also writes that screenshots showed the Pixel 11 Pro with the same display size as the Pixel 11, a 13MP front camera, and be capable of 120x digital zoom, and will cost between $1,099 and $1,449, up from $999 to $1,399 for last year's model. The article says the Pro XL will get a 6.8-inch, 120Hz display with a 2,991 x 1,344 resolution, feature a 5,115mAh battery, and a 13MP front camera. Like the base Pixel 11, it will apparently support Bluetooth 6 and Wi-Fi 6E. Citing Droid Life, Android Authority says the 11 Pro XL's pricing could range from $1,299 to $1,649, a $100 bump from its predecessor.
paragraphs.cn: Android Authority还称，截图显示Pixel 11 Pro屏幕尺寸与Pixel 11相同，配备1300万像素前置摄像头，支持120倍数码变焦，售价1,099至1,449美元(约合人民币7440至9810元)，高于上代的999至1,399美元(约合人民币6763至9471元)。Pro XL据称将配备6.8英寸120Hz屏幕，分辨率2,991×1,344，拥有5,115mAh电池和1300万像素前置摄像头，并同样支持蓝牙6和Wi-Fi 6E。该媒体援引Droid Life称，11 Pro XL售价可能为1,299至1,649美元(约合人民币8794元至1万元)，比前代贵100美元(约合人民币677元)。

paragraphs.en: Lastly, the Pixel 11 Pro Fold may have a 6.5-inch, 120Hz outer OLED display with a 2,342 x 1,080 resolution. It'll also have a 4,750mAh battery, 13MP front camera, and will support Bluetooth 6 and Wi-Fi 6E, according to the leak. It may be priced at $1,899 (up from last year's $1,799 base model) for the 256GB version, and $2,019 for the 512GB option. The author noted that the 10 Pro Fold had a larger, 5,015mAh battery pack and speculated that the smaller capacity in these screenshots could be inaccurate placeholder text. Of course, so could anything else in the early, now-deleted listings.
paragraphs.cn: 最后，Pixel 11 Pro Fold可能配备6.5英寸120Hz外部OLED屏幕，分辨率2,342×1,080。泄露信息还称其拥有4,750mAh电池、1300万像素前置摄像头，并支持蓝牙6和Wi-Fi 6E。256GB版售价可能为1,899美元(约合人民币1万元)，高于上代基础款的1,799美元(约合人民币1万元)；512GB版则为2,019美元(约合人民币1万元)。报道作者指出，10 Pro Fold配备容量更大的5,015mAh电池，因此截图中的较小容量可能只是错误的占位文字。当然，这些已被删除的提前上架页面中，其他信息同样可能不准确。

paragraphs.en: One thing that is for sure is that there will be a little color-shifting, glowing orb tucked into the Pixel 11's camera bar. 9to5Google noticed that in the animation that plays on Google's teaser page for the forthcoming phone. What it represents is up for debate, but let's have a little fun and speculate that it has something to do with AI.
paragraphs.cn: 唯一能够确定的是，Pixel 11相机条中藏着一颗会变色发光的小球。9to5Google在谷歌新机预告页面播放的动画中发现了它。它代表什么仍有争议，不过不妨大胆猜测一下：或许与AI有关。

paragraphs.en: Say it with me one last time: besides that glowing orb from Google's actual website, any number of the specs from these leaks could be wrong, and we will know for sure what's going on with these phones in just a little less than a month, when Google reveals the phones for real.
paragraphs.cn: 最后再强调一次：除了谷歌官网实际展示的发光小球，这些泄露中的任何规格都有可能出错。不到一个月后，谷歌正式发布手机时，我们才会确切知道它们的真实情况。
